title: Pipeline Sync — MyCase to GHL
summary: Keeps GoHighLevel opportunity stages aligned with pipeline changes coming from MyCase.
businessOutcome: Give operations and intake teams one reliable pipeline status across both platforms without manual updates.
thumbnail: Case status changes sync into GHL automatically.
problem: Teams lose trust in the CRM when case statuses diverge between MyCase and GoHighLevel.
solution: This workflow listens for MyCase status updates, finds the related GHL opportunity, and maps each case stage into the correct GoHighLevel pipeline stage.
workflowOverview: Receives MyCase pipeline updates in real time
Matches the correct GHL opportunity record
Applies the mapped stage for each pipeline state
resultsOrExpectedOutcome: Better handoff between intake and sales
audience: Legal intake teams, operations managers, CRM owners
